I did feel like a tickle in my throat before it started, but no, I'm not producing any phlegm. OK, um is the cough any worse at any particular time of day, like when you first get up or or at night when going to bed? No, it's pretty much just been there over the last, at least like 2 days. It's been getting worse, more frequent. OK, so um and are you coughing all throughout the day? Pretty much, at least for the last few days. Just it's been pretty nonstop. OK, anything that's made the cough worse? Uh, no, not really. It's uh, pretty much been the same for the last few days. Anything you've tried to make the cough go away? Just like Tylenol cold. And then I think there was another over the counter medication that I took, but nothing really helping. OK and uh, the cough has been been getting worse. Have you been experiencing any other symptoms? Um, I did just just last night, actually. I thought that I had some shortness of breath as well. I don't know if that's being caused by all the coughing, but yeah, I got pretty scared, so that's why I'm here today. OK, um has anything like this happened to you before? No, like I've been pretty healthy otherwise completely so this is this is completely new for me. Ok, and yeah, you mentioned you had a fever but did have you checked your temperature? OK, I have you had night sweats? No, not really, just mostly chills. OK, and how has your energy been the last few days, have you have you had a lot of fatigue? Yeah, I just feel completely just sick like what it feels like I have the flu or something and I just feel really tired too. OK, have you had a runny nose or sore throat? No, not really. I did have like a I don't know if it was soreness, but just like a tickle in my throat just a few days back before the coughing started. OK, yeah. And have you had any loss of smell or or loss of taste? Yeah, now that I think of it, I I I I can't I can barely taste taste the food that I'm eating. I don't know about smell I I'm pretty stuff stuff stuffy right now so that might just be because of that. I definitely notice I can't really taste my food. Alright. What, how did the shortness of breath come on? It hasn't happened after that, but I'm scared it will happen again. OK, and have you, how many pillows do you usually sleep with? Just one. Have you noticed any swelling in your feet or ankles? No, nothing like that. Alright, have you had any chest pain? No, no chest pain. Any feeling, any episodes where you feel like you were gonna faint? No. Feeling like your heart's racing? No, not really. Oh, OK, and any nausea or vomiting? I did feel a bit nauseous over the last two days, but I haven't vomited. OK and have you been diagnosed with any medical conditions in the past? No, I've been pretty lucky. No medical conditions. I don't even take any medications either. OK, anything over the counter like supplements or herbal? No, just just the cold medications over the counter, nothing else. OK, any allergies to medications? Not that I know. Any hospitalizations? No. Have you had any prior surgeries? Nope. OK, um, and could you tell me a little bit about your living situation now? Oh yeah, so I just live in a townhouse with my wife and two children. And yeah, currently, working as an engineer. OK how have the wife and kids been feeling at home? They're actually completely fine now. They don't seem to have any any symptoms of like coughing or anything like that. Anybody at work that's been sick? There was actually like just we work in the same kind of office setting. Not that I know, everything is pretty strict right now with with the pandemic going on. OK. Um and yeah, do you smoke cigarettes? No. Do you drink alcohol? Just rarely, maybe a couple times a month. OK, do you use recreational drugs like IV drug use or opioids or crystal meth, anything like that? No, nothing like that. OK, and are you currently sexually active? Yep. OK, could you tell me a little bit about your your partner or partners? Just my wife, no other sexual partners. OK and have you had a sexually transmitted infection before? Nope. OK, and so in regards to your family history, has anybody had similar symptoms before? No, not really. Not nothing like this. OK, any heart attacks or strokes in the family?
